column1: PATHSAATHI — INTEREST QUESTION BANK | Tiya · Day 2
10 questions per stream × 4 streams = 40 questions. Each answer maps to a career trait fed into Gemini's student profile.

column4: In a research lab discovering cures
column5: In a community helping large groups stay healthy
column6: Running a pharmacy or health business
column7: Patient care / Research / Public health / Entrepreneurship

column4: Running tests and analysing results
column5: Understanding how their lifestyle caused it

column5: I prefer a 3-yr course and start working sooner

column5: I prefer working with machines and equipment
